conservative.name: The Price of Knowledge
conservative.requirements:
Used By: Cult of the Broken Wheel
Within close range of the target

success.description: The Cult members use their unfathomable insights to confuse, rattle, and impair their opponents. The target moves 1 space towards a neutral stance, and whenever a recharge token is removed from this power, the GM places it on one of the target's actions
As above, and add 2 recharge tokens to this action

bane.description: The target may immediately perform a manoeuvre after the attacker completes this action

success.description: You use your unfathomable insights to confuse, rattle, and impair your opponents. The target moves 1 space towards a neutral stance, and whenever a recharge token is removed from this power, the GM places it on one of the target's actions
As above, add 2 additional recharge tokens on this action

bane.description: The target may immediately perform a manoeuvre after the attacker completes this action

chaosStar.description: The target may immediately remove 1 recharge token from one of his cards
